chapter_record_rules.description: FSH 1909.15 contents or zero-code source record.
FSH 1909.15 environmental analysis chapter source record.

reserved_superseded_authority_rules.reviewer_visible_rationale: Reserved or superseded Forest Service NEPA regulations may be displayed as currentness/supersession evidence, but may not derive active review rules.

source_partitions.description: Current source records eligible for extraction, claims, applicability, generated rules, and compliance findings.
Rescinded, revoked, superseded, reserved, or currentness-only source records visible for supersession/currentness relationships only.
Candidate, blocked, excluded, failed, or unresolved source records visible as graph blockers but not active review authority.

workbook_source_delta_plan.environmental_justice_civil_rights: Keep candidate-blocked until a scoped workbook/source delta adds official Title VI and USDA nondiscrimination sources.
workbook_source_delta_plan.fsh_1909_15: Add separate workbook rows for current official FSH 1909.15 contents/zero-code and chapter records used by EA review before graph export claims handbook completeness.
workbook_source_delta_plan.r1_forest_plan_support_documents: Promoted through config/r1_forest_plan_document_register_draft.csv; source_delta_required rows emit supplemental R1PLAN-* records, while documented gap rows remain excluded from corpus-ready planning.
workbook_source_delta_plan.reserved_36_cfr_part_220: If an explicit 36 CFR part 220 source record is added, place it in the currentness/supersession archive and link it to current USDA NEPA procedure sources.
